  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Your request is ambiguous. Are you asking for (A) a surface-level check for grammar, flow, and clarity, or (B) a deeper critique of the research argument, contribution claim, and logical consistency?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The open-ended request implies a check on whether the contribution claim is well-framed and understandable.",
    "R1.2": "A general review includes verifying that the argument progresses logically from the problem statement to the conclusion.",
    "R1.3": "The request to 'take a look' covers checking if the reported results support the main contribution claim.",
    "R1.6": "'Take a look' is often a request for feedback on sentence-level clarity, grammar, and overall readability.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must ensure that any limitations or uncertainties in the presented work are appropriately acknowledged.",
    "RX.2": "The agent must verify that the strength of the contribution claim is commensurate with the evidence provided.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must stick to analyzing the provided text and not speculate on unstated experimental details or broader impacts.",
    "RX.4": "The agent must consider and flag any potential negative consequences or dual-use applications of the described robotics research.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must base its analysis solely on the provided artifact and be able to trace its conclusions back to specific parts of the text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Your request is ambiguous. Are you asking for (A) a surface-level check for grammar, flow, and clarity, or (B) a deeper critique of the research argument, contribution claim, and logical consistency?

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request implies a check on whether the contribution claim is well-framed and understandable.
rationale.R1.2: A general review includes verifying that the argument progresses logically from the problem statement to the conclusion.
rationale.R1.3: The request to 'take a look' covers checking if the reported results support the main contribution claim.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look' is often a request for feedback on sentence-level clarity, grammar, and overall readability.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must ensure that any limitations or uncertainties in the presented work are appropriately acknowledged.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must verify that the strength of the contribution claim is commensurate with the evidence provided.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stick to analyzing the provided text and not speculate on unstated experimental details or broader impacts.
rationale.RX.4: The agent must consider and flag any potential negative consequences or dual-use applications of the described robotics research.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must base its analysis solely on the provided artifact and be able to trace its conclusions back to specific parts of the text.
